project_type: React 18 single-page canvas app (ThoughtFlow) built with Vite 6 and Tailwind CSS 3
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify the project builds successfully without errors
environment_constraints: Standard network mode - can install packages. No test framework present.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. ReminderPanel.jsx must NOT be modified.
key_patterns: All UI in a single App.jsx file (~6000+ lines). Header is a <header> element at line ~4407-4542 with justify-between layout (left section flex-1, right section shrink-0). Tailwind CSS utility classes used throughout. lucide-react for all icons. Existing ReminderPanel is in the sidebar, not in the header.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx (header at lines 4407-4542, imports at top)
src/index.css (global styles, keyframe animations go here)
directory_structure: Single src/ directory with App.jsx as the monolithic component, supporting components (ReminderPanel, CardEditorPanel, FullTaskManager, MiniMap, PinPanel, MarkdownRenderer), and CSS in index.css. Build config at root (vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js).
